arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ التَّصَوُّفُ الإِسْلَامِيُّ بِتَرْكِيزِهِ عَلَى الجَانِبِ الرُّوحِيِّ الدَّاخِلِيِّ لِلدِّينِ وَالسَّعْيِ إِلَى تَحْقِيقِ قُرْبٍ مِنَ اللهِ عَبْرَ الذِّكْرِ وَالتَّأَمُّلِ.
translation: Islamski sufizam odlikuje se fokusom na unutrašnji duhovni aspekt vjere i nastojanjem da se postigne blizina s Bogom putem zikra i meditacije.
translationEn: Islamic Sufism is distinguished by its focus on the inner spiritual aspect of religion and the pursuit of closeness to God through dhikr and contemplation.
